rdf:Description.dc:title: Josippon
Yosippon
Josippon
ספר יוסיפון
Sēfer Yosippon
Sēfer [Yosef] Ben Goryon
ዜና፡ አይሁድ፡
Zenā ʾAyhud
Story of Jews
መጽሐፈ፡ ሥርው፡
Maṣḥafa Śǝrw
Jsp.
